title: Inside api-policy-enforcement — the Policy Decision Point (PDP)
subtitle: box = component [technology] · arrow = uses / calls · evaluates permit/deny for the gateway PEP
rels: Decision Controller → Policy Evaluation Engine → permit / deny
Engine → Context-Aware Evaluation (geo via Core geoip-lookup · device · risk)
Engine → Policy Cache (KeyDB db3); on miss → backend-organization policy data
Decisions emitted to api-audit · sensitive fields redacted in responses
